creator: jmg@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 196421
run a bunch of threads, and detect if sleep fails to wakeup

This is a program I wrote to verify that sleep was working, and in my case it was not.  There is current patches attached to 229644 that are believed to fix the issue.

Attaching the program so others can find it if this problem crops up again.

Noah, you didn't include the platform of your system, so I'm going to assume that either you resolved it, or it's no longer an issue unless you comment on the bug.
